title: psychotria acutigemma subsp. acutigemma
intro: Psychotria acutigemma subsp. acutigemma, also known as the Red Mountain or Mountain Gold, is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub native to the tropical forests of Central and South America, valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. The plant's leaves and stems contain bioactive compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, pain, and respiratory problems, offering potential health benefits such as improved cardiovascular health and reduced oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in folk medicine, highlighting its importance as a medicinal plant in traditional practices.
